tasks.title: Decisions types + API client
tasks.description:
Create TypeScript types and API client functions for the Decisions module.

**Types file** (`decisions-types.ts`):
- `DecisionArea` — union type: 'business' | 'trading' | 'relationships' | 'wellbeing' | 'general'
- `Decision` — id: number, decision_text: string, context: string | null, expected_outcome: string | null, area: DecisionArea, confidence: number (0.0-1.0), decided_at: string, created_at: string, outcomes: DecisionOutcome[]
- `DecisionOutcome` — id: number, decision_id: number, actual_outcome: string, rating: number (1-5), outcome_date: string, created_at: string
- `DecisionCreate` — decision_text: string, context?: string, expected_outcome?: string, area: DecisionArea, confidence: number, decided_at?: string
- `OutcomeCreate` — actual_outcome: string, rating: number, outcome_date?: string
- `DecisionsListResponse` — decisions: Decision[], meta: { count: number, area?: string, latency_ms: number }
- `DecisionResponse` — id: number, decision_text: string, context: string | null, expected_outcome: string | null, area: DecisionArea, confidence: number, decided_at: string, created_at: string
- `OutcomeResponse` — id: number, decision_id: number, actual_outcome: string, rating: number, outcome_date: string, created_at: string
- `PatternsResponse` — insights: string (markdown in Polish), meta: { decision_count: number, areas: string[], latency_ms: number }
- `DecisionIntelligenceResponse` — analysis: any (shape TBD from runtime), meta: { months: number, latency_ms: number }

**API client** (`decisions.ts`):
Use `customFetch<T>()` from `./base`. Functions:
- `fetchDecisions(params?: { area?: string, limit?: number })` → GET `/decisions/decisions` — build queryParams for area and limit
- `createDecision(data: DecisionCreate)` → POST `/decisions/decision` — send as JSON body
- `addOutcome(decisionId: number, data: OutcomeCreate)` → POST `/decisions/decision/${decisionId}/outcome` — send as JSON body
- `fetchDecisionPatterns()` → GET `/decisions/decisions/patterns`
- `fetchDecisionIntelligence(params?: { months?: number })` → GET `/decision-intelligence` — optional months query param
- `runDecisionIntelligence()` → POST `/decision-intelligence/run`

Update `index.ts` to re-export from `decisions.ts` and `decisions-types.ts`.

tasks.title: Calendar types + API client
tasks.description:
Create TypeScript types and API client functions for Calendar, Meeting Prep, and Meeting Minutes modules.

**Types file** (`calendar-types.ts`):
- `CalendarEvent` — id: string, subject: string, start: string (ISO), end: string (ISO), organizer?: string, attendees?: string[], location?: string, is_online?: boolean
- `CalendarConflict` — event_a: CalendarEvent, event_b: CalendarEvent, overlap_minutes: number
- `CalendarAnalytics` — total_meetings: number, total_hours: number, meetings_by_day: Record<string, number>, focus_time_hours: number, meeting_categories?: Record<string, number>
- `CalendarSuggestion` — subject: string, suggested_attendees: string[], reason: string, priority?: string
- `MeetingPrep` — meeting: CalendarEvent, brief: string, participants_info: { name: string, role?: string, recent_topics?: string[] }[], recent_context: string[]
- `MeetingMinutes` — id: number, document_id: number, title: string, date: string | null, participants: string | null, summary: string, created: string
- `MeetingROI` — meetings: { subject: string, roi_score: number, reason: string }[], summary: string
- `DeepWorkRequest` — date?: string, start_hour?: number (default 9), end_hour?: number (default 11)
- `DeepWorkResponse` — success: boolean, message: string
- `CalendarEventsResponse` — events: CalendarEvent[]
- `CalendarConflictsResponse` — conflicts: CalendarConflict[]
- `MeetingSuggestionsResponse` — suggestions: CalendarSuggestion[]

**API client** (`calendar.ts`):
Use `customFetch<T>()` from `./base`. Functions:
- `fetchCalendarEvents(params?: { days?: number })` → GET `/calendar/events`
- `fetchCalendarConflicts(params?: { days?: number })` → GET `/calendar/conflicts`
- `fetchCalendarAnalytics(params?: { days?: number })` → GET `/calendar/analytics`
- `fetchMeetingSuggestions()` → GET `/calendar/suggestions`
- `blockDeepWork(data: DeepWorkRequest)` → POST `/calendar/block-deep-work` — send as JSON body
- `fetchMeetingPrep()` → GET `/meeting-prep`
- `fetchMeetingMinutes(params?: { limit?: number })` → GET `/meeting-minutes`
- `generateMeetingMinutes()` → POST `/meeting-minutes/generate`
- `fetchMeetingROI()` → GET `/meeting-roi`

Update `index.ts` to re-export from `calendar.ts` and `calendar-types.ts`.

tasks.title: Documents types + API client
tasks.description:
Create TypeScript types and API client functions for Documents module.

**Types file** (`documents-types.ts`):
- `SourceType` — union: 'email' | 'teams' | 'whatsapp' | 'document' | 'pdf' | 'plaud' | 'chatgpt' | 'calendar'
- `DocumentSource` — document_id: number, title: string, source_type: SourceType, created_at: string, classification?: string
- `DocumentSearchMatch` — chunk_id: number, document_id: number, score: number, text: string
- `DocumentSearchResult` — answer: string, sources: DocumentSource[], matches: DocumentSearchMatch[], meta: { question_type: string, latency_ms: number, cache_hit: boolean }
- `DocumentSearchParams` — query: string, source_types?: string[], date_from?: string, date_to?: string, top_k?: number, mode?: string
- `DocumentListItem` — id: number, title: string, source_type: SourceType, classification: string, created_at: string, chunk_count?: number
- `DocumentListResponse` — documents: DocumentListItem[], meta: { total: number, page: number, per_page: number }
- `DocumentDetail` — id: number, title: string, source_type: SourceType, classification: string, created_at: string, chunks: { id: number, text: string, position: number }[], entities?: any[], events?: any[]
- `DocumentUploadResponse` — success: boolean, document_id: number, message: string
- `IngestionDashboard` — sources: Record<string, { total: number, last_imported: string | null }>, extraction_backlogs: Record<string, number>, dlq_stats: { total: number, by_error: Record<string, number> }, guardian_alerts: { total: number, critical: number }

**API client** (`documents.ts`):
Use `customFetch<T>()` from `./base`. Functions:
- `searchDocuments(data: DocumentSearchParams)` → POST `/ask` — send full body including `source_types` filter. This is the existing semantic search endpoint used with document-specific filters.
- `fetchDocumentsList(params?: { source_type?: string, classification?: string, page?: number, per_page?: number })` → GET `/documents` — NOTE: this backend endpoint needs to be created. Build query params. If endpoint returns 404, return empty result with console.warn.
- `fetchDocumentDetail(documentId: number)` → GET `/documents/${documentId}` — NOTE: this backend endpoint needs to be created. If 404, return null.
- `uploadDocument(file: File, classification?: string)` → POST `/documents/upload` — NOTE: this backend endpoint needs to be created. Use FormData for multipart upload: `const formData = new FormData(); formData.append('file', file); if (classification) formData.append('classification', classification);` Pass formData directly, set Content-Type to undefined to let browser set boundary.
- `fetchIngestionDashboard()` → GET `/ingestion/dashboard`

Update `index.ts` to re-export from `documents.ts` and `documents-types.ts`.

tasks.title: Decisions hooks + store
tasks.description:
Create Zustand store and React Query hooks for Decisions module.

**Store** (`decisions-store.ts`):
Zustand store with `persist` middleware, storage key `gilbertus-decisions`.
State:
- `areaFilter: string | null` (default null = all areas)
- `searchQuery: string` (default '')
- `listLimit: number` (default 50)
- `activeTab: 'journal' | 'patterns' | 'intelligence'` (default 'journal')
- `expandedDecisionId: number | null` (default null)
- `intelligenceMonths: number` (default 6)
Actions: `setAreaFilter`, `setSearchQuery`, `setListLimit`, `setActiveTab`, `setExpandedDecisionId`, `setIntelligenceMonths`.

**Hooks** (`use-decisions.ts`):
Import API functions from `@gilbertus/api-client`. Import store from `../stores/decisions-store`.

Query hooks:
- `useDecisions(area?: string, limit?: number)` — queryKey: ['decisions', area, limit], staleTime: 30_000. Fetches via `fetchDecisions({area, limit})`.
- `useDecisionPatterns()` — queryKey: ['decision-patterns'], staleTime: 120_000. Fetches via `fetchDecisionPatterns()`. Returns markdown string in `insights`.
- `useDecisionIntelligence(months?: number)` — queryKey: ['decision-intelligence', months], staleTime: 120_000. Fetches via `fetchDecisionIntelligence({months})`.

Mutation hooks:
- `useCreateDecision()` — mutationFn: `createDecision`, onSuccess: invalidate ['decisions']. Returns the created decision.
- `useAddOutcome()` — mutationFn: `({decisionId, data}) => addOutcome(decisionId, data)`, onSuccess: invalidate ['decisions']. Accepts `{decisionId: number, data: OutcomeCreate}`.
- `useRunIntelligence()` — mutationFn: `runDecisionIntelligence`, onSuccess: invalidate ['decision-intelligence'].

All hooks use `useQueryClient()` for invalidation in mutation onSuccess callbacks.

tasks.title: Calendar hooks + store
tasks.description:
Create Zustand store and React Query hooks for Calendar module.

**Store** (`calendar-store.ts`):
Zustand store with `persist` middleware, storage key `gilbertus-calendar`.
State:
- `weekOffset: number` (default 0 = current week)
- `eventsDays: number` (default 7)
- `activeTab: 'week' | 'prep' | 'minutes' | 'analytics'` (default 'week')
- `selectedEventId: string | null` (default null)
- `analyticsDays: number` (default 30)
- `autoRefresh: boolean` (default true)
- `refreshInterval: number` (default 300_000 = 5 min)
Actions: `setWeekOffset`, `nextWeek` (weekOffset + 1), `prevWeek` (weekOffset - 1), `setActiveTab`, `setSelectedEventId`, `setAnalyticsDays`, `toggleAutoRefresh`.

**Hooks** (`use-calendar.ts`):
Import API functions from `@gilbertus/api-client`. Import store.

Query hooks:
- `useCalendarEvents(days?: number)` — queryKey: ['calendar-events', days], staleTime: 60_000, refetchInterval based on store autoRefresh.
- `useCalendarConflicts(days?: number)` — queryKey: ['calendar-conflicts', days], staleTime: 60_000.
- `useCalendarAnalytics(days?: number)` — queryKey: ['calendar-analytics', days], staleTime: 120_000.
- `useMeetingPrep()` — queryKey: ['meeting-prep'], staleTime: 300_000.
- `useMeetingMinutes(limit?: number)` — queryKey: ['meeting-minutes', limit], staleTime: 60_000.
- `useMeetingSuggestions()` — queryKey: ['meeting-suggestions'], staleTime: 300_000.
- `useMeetingROI()` — queryKey: ['meeting-roi'], staleTime: 120_000.

Mutation hooks:
- `useBlockDeepWork()` — mutationFn: `blockDeepWork`, onSuccess: invalidate ['calendar-events'].
- `useGenerateMinutes()` — mutationFn: `generateMeetingMinutes`, onSuccess: invalidate ['meeting-minutes'].

tasks.title: Documents hooks + store
tasks.description:
Create Zustand store and React Query hooks for Documents module.

**Store** (`documents-store.ts`):
Zustand store with `persist` middleware, storage key `gilbertus-documents`.
State:
- `searchQuery: string` (default '')
- `sourceTypeFilter: string[]` (default [] = all)
- `dateFrom: string | null` (default null)
- `dateTo: string | null` (default null)
- `classificationFilter: string | null` (default null)
- `browseSourceType: string | null` (default null)
- `activeTab: 'search' | 'browse' | 'ingestion'` (default 'search')
- `selectedDocumentId: number | null` (default null)
Actions: `setSearchQuery`, `setSourceTypeFilter`, `setDateRange(from, to)`, `setActiveTab`, `setSelectedDocumentId`, `setBrowseSourceType`, `setClassificationFilter`, `clearFilters` (resets all filters to defaults).

**Hooks** (`use-documents.ts`):
Query hooks:
- `useDocumentSearch(query: string, sourceTypes?: string[], dateFrom?: string, dateTo?: string)` — queryKey: ['document-search', query, sourceTypes, dateFrom, dateTo], enabled: query.length >= 2. Fetches via `searchDocuments({query, source_types: sourceTypes, date_from: dateFrom, date_to: dateTo})`. staleTime: 30_000.
- `useDocumentsList(params?: { source_type?: string, classification?: string, page?: number })` — queryKey: ['documents-list', params], staleTime: 60_000. Fetches via `fetchDocumentsList(params)`. NOTE: may return empty if backend endpoint not yet created.
- `useDocumentDetail(id: number)` — queryKey: ['document-detail', id], enabled: !!id, staleTime: 60_000. Fetches via `fetchDocumentDetail(id)`. NOTE: may return null if backend endpoint not yet created.
- `useIngestionDashboard()` — queryKey: ['ingestion-dashboard'], staleTime: 30_000. Fetches via `fetchIngestionDashboard()`.

Mutation hooks:
- `useDocumentUpload()` — mutationFn: `({file, classification}) => uploadDocument(file, classification)`, onSuccess: invalidate ['documents-list', 'ingestion-dashboard']. NOTE: backend endpoint not yet created, mutation will fail gracefully.

tasks.title: Decisions UI components
tasks.description:
Create UI components for the Decisions module in `packages/ui/src/components/decisions/`.

**1. confidence-slider.tsx**
Props: `{ value: number, onChange: (v: number) => void, disabled?: boolean }`
- Range input 0-100 (maps to 0.0-1.0 for API)
- Labeled ticks: 0%, 25%, 50%, 75%, 100%
- Color gradient: red (0-25) → amber (25-50) → green (50-100)
- Current value displayed as percentage

**2. star-rating.tsx**
Props: `{ value: number, onChange?: (v: number) => void, readonly?: boolean, size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' }`
- 5 stars (Lucide `Star` icon), filled up to `value`
- Interactive hover preview when not readonly
- Click sets value (1-5)
- Size variants: sm=16px, md=20px, lg=24px

**3. decision-card.tsx**
Props: `{ decision: Decision, expanded: boolean, onToggle: () => void, onAddOutcome: (id: number) => void }`
- Area badge (color-coded: business=blue, trading=green, relationships=purple, wellbeing=amber, general=gray)
- Decision text (truncated if not expanded)
- Confidence bar using ConfidenceSlider colors (readonly display)
- Date (decided_at, formatted as 'DD.MM.YYYY')
- Expandable section: context, expected_outcome
- Outcomes list with StarRating (readonly) + actual_outcome text
- "Dodaj wynik" button → calls onAddOutcome(decision.id)

**4. decision-filters.tsx**
Props: `{ areaFilter: string | null, onAreaChange: (area: string | null) => void, searchQuery: string, onSearchChange: (q: string) => void }`
- Area dropdown: Wszystkie, Biznes, Trading, Relacje, Wellbeing, Ogólne
- Search input with Lucide Search icon, debounced 300ms
- Inline layout (flex row)

**5. create-decision-modal.tsx**
Props: `{ open: boolean, onClose: () => void, onSubmit: (data: DecisionCreate) => void, isLoading?: boolean }`
- Modal dialog (use Radix Dialog)
- Fields: decision_text (textarea, required), area (select, required), confidence (ConfidenceSlider), context (textarea, optional), expected_outcome (textarea, optional), decided_at (date input, optional)
- Submit button: "Zapisz decyzję"
- Validation: decision_text required, area required

**6. outcome-modal.tsx**
Props: `{ open: boolean, onClose: () => void, onSubmit: (data: OutcomeCreate) => void, decisionText: string, isLoading?: boolean }`
- Modal dialog
- Shows decision_text as reference (readonly, muted)
- Fields: actual_outcome (textarea, required), rating (StarRating interactive), outcome_date (date input, optional)
- Submit button: "Zapisz wynik"

**7. patterns-panel.tsx**
Props: `{ insights: string | undefined, isLoading: boolean, meta?: { decision_count: number, areas: string[] } }`
- Loading: skeleton blocks
- Loaded: render `insights` markdown using react-markdown + remark-gfm
- Meta info bar: "Analiza {decision_count} decyzji w {areas.length} obszarach"

**8. decision-intelligence.tsx**
Props: `{ data: any, isLoading: boolean, months: number, onMonthsChange: (m: number) => void, onRunAnalysis: () => void, isRunning?: boolean }`
- Loading: skeleton
- Months selector (3, 6, 12)
- "Uruchom analizę" button (disabled when isRunning)
- Display data as structured cards/sections (format TBD from runtime response shape)
- Fallback: render as formatted JSON if structure unknown

**9. index.ts** — barrel exports for all components.

All components: Tailwind CSS, dark theme variables, Polish labels, import types from `@gilbertus/api-client`.

tasks.title: Calendar UI components
tasks.description:
Create UI components for the Calendar module in `packages/ui/src/components/calendar/`.

**1. event-block.tsx**
Props: `{ event: CalendarEvent, hasConflict?: boolean, onClick?: (id: string) => void, compact?: boolean }`
- Colored block positioned within day column (height proportional to duration)
- Subject text (truncated if compact)
- Time range (HH:MM - HH:MM)
- Online meeting icon (Lucide Video) if is_online
- Red border + conflict icon if hasConflict
- Click → calls onClick(event.id)

**2. day-column.tsx**
Props: `{ date: string, events: CalendarEvent[], conflicts: CalendarConflict[], onEventClick?: (id: string) => void }`
- Column header: day name (Pon, Wt, Śr, Czw, Pt, Sob, Ndz) + date (DD.MM)
- Today highlighted with accent border
- Events positioned by start/end time (calculate top/height as % of 24h or working hours 7-21)
- Overlapping events rendered side-by-side (reduced width)

**3. week-view.tsx**
Props: `{ events: CalendarEvent[], conflicts: CalendarConflict[], weekOffset: number, onEventClick?: (id: string) => void, isLoading?: boolean }`
- CSS Grid: time gutter (left) + 7 DayColumns
- Time gutter: hour labels 07:00 - 21:00 (working hours focus)
- Horizontal grid lines per hour
- Loading: skeleton grid
- Calculate week dates from weekOffset (Monday-based, Europe/Warsaw)

**4. meeting-prep-card.tsx**
Props: `{ prep: MeetingPrep }`
- Card with meeting subject + time at top
- Attendees list (avatars/names)
- Brief section: markdown rendered (react-markdown)
- Recent context: bullet list of relevant items
- Collapsible sections for long content

**5. minutes-card.tsx**
Props: `{ minutes: MeetingMinutes, expanded?: boolean, onToggle?: () => void }`
- Title + date + participants
- Summary (expandable, markdown)
- Created timestamp in footer

**6. calendar-analytics.tsx**
Props: `{ analytics: CalendarAnalytics | undefined, roi: MeetingROI | undefined, isLoading: boolean }`
- KPI row: Spotkania, Godziny, Czas skupienia (KpiCard style)
- Time distribution: Recharts PieChart (meetings vs focus vs free)
- Meetings per day: Recharts BarChart (meetings_by_day)
- Meeting categories: horizontal bar chart if available
- ROI table: subject, roi_score (color-coded), reason. Sortable by score.

**7. deep-work-modal.tsx**
Props: `{ open: boolean, onClose: () => void, onSubmit: (data: DeepWorkRequest) => void, isLoading?: boolean }`
- Date picker (default: tomorrow)
- Start hour select (7-12, default 9)
- End hour select (8-18, default 11, must be > start)
- Duration display (calculated)
- Submit: "Zablokuj czas"

**8. event-detail-popover.tsx**
Props: `{ event: CalendarEvent | null, onClose: () => void, anchorEl?: HTMLElement }`
- Popover (Radix Popover) showing: subject, full time range, organizer, attendees list, location/online link
- "Przygotowanie" link if meeting prep available

**9. index.ts** — barrel exports.

All components: Tailwind, dark theme, Polish labels/day names, types from `@gilbertus/api-client`.

tasks.title: Documents UI components
tasks.description:
Create UI components for the Documents module in `packages/ui/src/components/documents/`.

**1. search-bar.tsx**
Props: `{ query: string, onChange: (q: string) => void, onSubmit?: () => void, placeholder?: string, isLoading?: boolean }`
- Input with Lucide Search icon on left
- Debounced onChange (500ms internal debounce)
- Loading spinner replaces search icon when isLoading
- Enter key triggers onSubmit
- Placeholder default: "Szukaj w dokumentach..."

**2. source-type-filter.tsx**
Props: `{ selected: string[], onChange: (types: string[]) => void, counts?: Record<string, number> }`
- Horizontal chip/toggle buttons for each source type
- Source types: email, teams, whatsapp, document, pdf, plaud, chatgpt, calendar
- Each chip: icon (Lucide: Mail, Users, MessageCircle, FileText, FileText, Mic, Bot, Calendar) + label + optional count badge
- Multi-select: click toggles inclusion. Empty selection = all.
- Polish labels: Email, Teams, WhatsApp, Dokumenty, PDF, Plaud, ChatGPT, Kalendarz

**3. document-result-card.tsx**
Props: `{ source: DocumentSource, match: DocumentSearchMatch, onClick?: (documentId: number) => void }`
- Title (bold) + source_type badge (colored chip)
- Score bar (0-1 relevance)
- Match text snippet with keyword highlighting (bold matching terms)
- Date (created_at formatted)
- Click → onClick(source.document_id)

**4. documents-table.tsx**
Props: `{ documents: DocumentListItem[], onRowClick?: (id: number) => void, isLoading?: boolean }`
- Table columns: Tytuł, Typ źródła (badge), Klasyfikacja (badge), Data, Chunki
- Sortable columns (client-side)
- Loading: skeleton rows
- Empty state: "Brak dokumentów" with filter suggestion
- Clickable rows

**5. upload-modal.tsx**
Props: `{ open: boolean, onClose: () => void, onUpload: (file: File, classification?: string) => void, isUploading?: boolean, progress?: number }`
- Modal dialog
- DropZone component (see below) for file selection
- File preview: name, size (formatted KB/MB), type icon
- Classification select: public, internal, confidential (default based on role context)
- Upload button: "Wgraj" (disabled until file selected)
- Progress bar during upload
- Accepted file types: .pdf, .docx, .xlsx, .txt, .png, .jpg, .jpeg

**6. drop-zone.tsx**
Props: `{ onFileSelect: (file: File) => void, accept?: string, disabled?: boolean }`
- Dashed border area with Lucide Upload icon + "Przeciągnij plik lub kliknij"
- Drag-and-drop: onDragOver/onDragLeave/onDrop handlers
- Click triggers hidden file input
- Visual feedback on drag-over (border color change, background highlight)
- File type validation against accept prop

**7. ingestion-status.tsx**
Props: `{ dashboard: IngestionDashboard | undefined, isLoading: boolean }`
- Source health cards: one card per source_type showing total count + last_imported timestamp
- Extraction backlog: bar for each source showing pending count
- DLQ stats: total errors, breakdown by error type
- Guardian alerts: critical count highlighted in red
- Auto-refresh indicator

**8. document-detail-panel.tsx**
Props: `{ document: DocumentDetail | null, isLoading: boolean, onClose: () => void }`
- Slide-over panel from right (or full-width section)
- Header: title, source_type badge, classification badge, date
- Chunks list: numbered, with text content in readable format
- Entities section (if available): tags/chips
- Events section (if available): timeline items
- Close button
- Loading: skeleton
- Empty/null state: "Szczegóły dokumentu niedostępne" (backend endpoint not yet created)

**9. index.ts** — barrel exports.

All components: Tailwind, dark theme, Polish labels, types from `@gilbertus/api-client`.

tasks.title: Decisions page assembly
tasks.description:
Create the Decisions page route that assembles all Decisions components. **Page** (`app/(app)/decisions/page.tsx`): - Wrap entire page in `` (CEO only) - Use `useDecisions()`, `useDecisionPatterns()`, `useDecisionIntelligence()` hooks - Use `useCreateDecision()`, `useAddOutcome()`, `useRunIntelligence()` mutations - Use `useDecisionsStore()` for local state (activeTab, areaFilter, expandedDecisionId, etc.) Layout: ```

Decyzje

 Dziennik Wzorce AI Intelligence {decisions.map(d => )}
``` Behavior: - On create success: close modal, toast "Decyzja zapisana", list auto-refreshes via query invalidation - On outcome success: close modal, toast "Wynik zapisany", card auto-refreshes - Area filter + search filter decisions client-side (API also supports area filter) - Expanded decision stored in store for persistence across tab switches Use Radix Tabs from shadcn/ui. Polish labels throughout. Loading skeletons for each tab content.

tasks.title: Calendar page assembly
tasks.description:
Create the Calendar page route that assembles all Calendar components. **Page** (`app/(app)/calendar/page.tsx`): - Wrap in `` (manager+) - Use `useCalendarEvents()`, `useCalendarConflicts()`, `useCalendarAnalytics()`, `useMeetingPrep()`, `useMeetingMinutes()`, `useMeetingROI()`, `useMeetingSuggestions()` hooks - Use `useBlockDeepWork()`, `useGenerateMinutes()` mutations - Use `useCalendarStore()` for state Layout: ```

Kalendarz

Tydzień {weekLabel}
Tydzień Przygotowanie Protokoły Analityka {preps?.map(p => )}
{minutes?.map(m => )} setSelectedEventId(null)} />
``` Behavior: - Week navigation: prev/next buttons change weekOffset in store. Pass calculated `days` param to API (offset from today). - Event click → EventDetailPopover appears - Deep work submit → toast "Czas zablokowany", calendar refreshes - Generate minutes → toast "Protokoły wygenerowane", list refreshes - Meeting suggestions shown as a side section or card below main content Helper: calculate week start date from weekOffset (Monday-based). Format: `startOfWeek = addWeeks(startOfCurrentWeek, weekOffset)`. Use simple date math, no external date library needed (or use built-in Intl).

tasks.title: Documents page assembly
tasks.description:
Create the Documents page route that assembles all Documents components. **Page** (`app/(app)/documents/page.tsx`): - Wrap in `` (director+) - Use `useDocumentSearch()`, `useDocumentsList()`, `useDocumentDetail()`, `useIngestionDashboard()` hooks - Use `useDocumentUpload()` mutation - Use `useDocumentsStore()` for state Layout: ```

Dokumenty

 Szukaj Przeglądaj Ingestion
{searchResults && (
{searchResults.answer &&
{searchResults.answer}
} {searchResults.matches?.map((match, i) => ( ))}
)}
setBrowseSourceType(types[0] || null)} />
{/* Note: browse depends on GET /documents endpoint (not yet created). Show info banner if 404. */} {selectedDocumentId && ( setSelectedDocumentId(null)} /> )}
``` Behavior: - Search: debounced query triggers useDocumentSearch. Results show answer + match cards. - Browse: loads document list (may show "Endpoint w przygotowaniu" banner if backend returns 404) - Upload: director+ only. On success → toast "Dokument wgrany", switch to ingestion tab to show processing status. - Document detail: click any document → side panel with chunks and metadata (may show placeholder if backend endpoint not ready) - Ingestion tab: shows real-time health of all source pipelines Graceful degradation for missing backend endpoints: show informational banners ("Ta funkcja wymaga aktualizacji backendu") rather than error states. Search via `/ask` works immediately.
